checkpoints.action: Output acceptance-criteria-<task_id>.json using Executable AC schema (four type: ui|api|data|hook; ac_uid = sha256(type+given+when+then+check) first 16 chars)
Emit complexity_tier and risk_level in BA output JSON to gate test-writer trigger (complexity_tier>=STANDARD or risk_level=high)
Call Blast Radius Tool Phase 1 (BA prediction based on files_to_modify); produce blast-radius-map.json in dev-registry/<task_id>/
Add acceptance_criteria_path field to ba.md Output JSON referencing docs/dev/acceptance-criteria-<task_id>.json
Quantify all subjective visual AC items (color token, px measurement) before using testability:manual-only (produces pending_manual_evidence status)
